v1.0 2026-07-24 Linux x86_64

Trade Flow 三机器部署文档

业务处理 / 数据分析 / 监控中心 — 三机分离架构完整部署指南

目录
  • 1. 架构总览
  • 2. 前置准备
  • 3. 机器A 部署
  • 4. 机器B 部署
  • 5. 机器C 部署
  • 6. 监控配置
  • 7. 网络与安全
  • 8. 验证与运维

1架构总览

Trade Flow 系统按职责拆分为三台物理机：机器A 承担业务实时处理链路，机器B 承担数据分析与离线同步，机器C 作为监控中心并承载一套独立业务环境。三机通过内网通信，监控指标统一汇聚到机器C 的 Prometheus + Grafana。

graph TB
    subgraph "机器A (16G) — 业务处理"
        FUIOU[富友 HTTP Push]
        NGINX_A[Nginx :80/:443]
        INGRESS[trade-ingress :8115]
        MYSQL_A[(MySQL 8.x
trade_flow + trade_pipeline)]
        REDIS_A[(Redis 7.x
Stream / Lock)]
        PIPELINE[trade-pipeline :8083]
        NE_A[node_exporter :9100]
        ME_A[mysqld_exporter :9104]
        RE_A[redis_exporter :9121]

        FUIOU --> NGINX_A --> INGRESS
        INGRESS --> MYSQL_A
        INGRESS --> REDIS_A
        REDIS_A -.Stream.-> PIPELINE
        PIPELINE --> MYSQL_A
        PIPELINE --ACK--> INGRESS
    end

    subgraph "机器B (32G) — 数据分析"
        FLINK[Flink CDC Job]
        DORIS_FE[Doris FE :8030]
        DORIS_BE[Doris BE :9060]
        ANALYTICS[trade-analytics :8088]
        NE_B[node_exporter :9100]

        FLINK --binlog--> MYSQL_A
        FLINK --> DORIS_FE
        DORIS_FE --> DORIS_BE
        ANALYTICS --> DORIS_FE
    end

    subgraph "机器C (8c8g) — 监控中心"
        PROM[Prometheus :9090]
        GRAFANA[Grafana :3000]
        MYSQL_C[(MySQL 8.x)]
        REDIS_C[(Redis 7.x)]
        JAVA_C[trade-ingress + trade-pipeline]
        NE_C[node_exporter :9100]

        PROM -.scrape.-> NE_A
        PROM -.scrape.-> ME_A
        PROM -.scrape.-> RE_A
        PROM -.scrape.-> NE_B
        PROM -.scrape.-> NE_C
        GRAFANA --> PROM
    end

    style FUIOU fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style INGRESS fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style PIPELINE fill:#1e3a5f,color:#fff
    style FLINK fill:#3b1e5f,color:#fff
    style DORIS_FE fill:#3b1e5f,color:#fff
    style ANALYTICS fill:#3b1e5f,color:#fff
    style PROM fill:#1e5f4f,color:#fff
    style GRAFANA fill:#1e5f4f,color:#fff

资源分配概览

机器 角色 规格 核心组件 预估内存
机器A 业务处理 16G RAM Nginx, Ingress, Pipeline, MySQL, Redis ~14G
机器B 数据分析 32G RAM Flink CDC, Doris (FE+BE), trade-analytics ~28G
机器C 监控中心 8C 8G Prometheus, Grafana, MySQL, Redis, Java 服务 ~7G
设计要点

监控指标由机器C 统一拉取（Pull 模式），不占用业务机额外进程；每台业务机仅部署轻量 exporter（内存 < 50MB），对业务零侵入。

2前置准备

2.1 系统要求

项目 要求 说明
操作系统 Ubuntu 22.04 LTS / CentOS 8+ 推荐 Ubuntu 22.04
架构 x86_64 所有组件均为 x86 构建
JDK OpenJDK 17 三机均需安装
时间同步 chrony / ntpd 三机时间差需 < 500ms（雪花ID约束）
磁盘 SSD ≥ 200G（A/B），SSD ≥ 100G（C） MySQL/Doris 数据目录建议独立挂载

2.2 IP 规划（示例）

以下 IP 为示例，实际部署时替换为真实内网地址。三机需在同一内网，互通且延迟 < 2ms。

机器 内网 IP hostname 备注
机器A 10.0.1.10 trade-a 对外暴露 80/443（富友回调）
机器B 10.0.1.20 trade-b 内网访问机器A MySQL binlog
机器C 10.0.1.30 trade-c 暴露 3000（Grafana）给运维网络

三机共同初始化

在每台机器上执行以下基础配置：

所有机器执行
# 1. 设置 hostname（在各机器分别执行）
# 机器A:
sudo hostnamectl set-hostname trade-a
# 机器B:
sudo hostnamectl set-hostname trade-b
# 机器C:
sudo hostnamectl set-hostname trade-c

# 2. 配置 hosts 互信
sudo tee -a /etc/hosts << 'EOF'
10.0.1.10  trade-a
10.0.1.20  trade-b
10.0.1.30  trade-c
EOF

# 3. 安装 JDK 17
sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y openjdk-17-jdk

# 4. 验证 Java
java -version
# openjdk version "17.x.x"

# 5. 安装时间同步
sudo apt install -y chrony
sudo systemctl enable --now chrony

# 6. 验证时间同步
chronyc tracking
# 确认 Offset < 500ms

# 7. 系统参数调优
sudo tee -a /etc/sysctl.conf << 'EOF'
# 文件描述符
fs.file-max = 655350
# TCP
net.core.somaxconn = 65535
net.ipv4.tcp_max_syn_backlog = 65535
net.ipv4.tcp_fin_timeout = 15
net.ipv4.tcp_tw_reuse = 1
# 内存
vm.swappiness = 1
vm.max_map_count = 262144
EOF
sudo sysctl -p

sudo tee -a /etc/security/limits.conf << 'EOF'
*  soft  nofile  655350
*  hard  nofile  655350
*  soft  nproc   65535
*  hard  nproc   65535
EOF

3机器A 部署（16G — 业务处理）

机器A 16G RAM · Ubuntu 22.04 · IP: 10.0.1.10

职责：接收富友 HTTP 回调，验签写 Storage，发布 Redis Stream 事件，Pipeline 消费后写结构化业务表。

组件：Nginx, trade-ingress (8115), trade-pipeline (8083), MySQL 8.x, Redis 7.x, node_exporter, mysqld_exporter, redis_exporter

内存分配

OS
Nginx
Ingress 2G
Pipeline 3G
MySQL 6G
Redis 2G
exporters

3.1 安装 MySQL 8.x

机器A 执行
# 安装 MySQL 8.0
sudo apt install -y mysql-server-8.0

# 启动
sudo systemctl enable --now mysql

# 安全初始化
sudo mysql_secure_installation

# 登录并创建业务库与 CDC 账号
sudo mysql -u root -p << 'SQL'
-- 创建数据库
CREATE DATABASE trade_flow DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
CREATE DATABASE trade_pipeline DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

-- 创建应用账号
CREATE USER 'app_trade'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'YourStrongPwd_2026';
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON trade_flow.* TO 'app_trade'@'localhost';
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON trade_pipeline.* TO 'app_trade'@'localhost';

-- 创建 CDC 同步账号（供机器B Flink 使用）
CREATE USER 'cdc_user'@'10.0.1.20' IDENTIFIED BY 'CdcSync_2026!';
GRANT SELECT, REPLICATION SLAVE, REPLICATION CLIENT ON *.* TO 'cdc_user'@'10.0.1.20';

-- 创建监控账号（供机器C mysqld_exporter 使用）
CREATE USER 'monitor'@'10.0.1.30' IDENTIFIED BY 'Monitor_2026!';
GRANT PROCESS, REPLICATION CLIENT, SELECT ON *.* TO 'monitor'@'10.0.1.30';

FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
SQL

MySQL 配置调优

/etc/mysql/mysql.conf.d/trade.cnf
[mysqld]
# 基本配置
bind-address        = 0.0.0.0
port                = 3306
character_set_server = utf8mb4
collation_server     = utf8mb4_unicode_ci
default_time_zone    = '+08:00'

# InnoDB (16G 机器分配 6G)
innodb_buffer_pool_size = 6G
innodb_buffer_pool_instances = 4
innodb_log_file_size    = 1G
innodb_log_buffer_size  = 64M
innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit = 2
innodb_flush_method     = O_DIRECT
innodb_io_capacity      = 2000
innodb_io_capacity_max  = 4000

# 连接
max_connections         = 200
thread_cache_size       = 32
table_open_cache        = 4096

# binlog (CDC 需要)
server_id               = 10
log_bin                 = /var/lib/mysql/binlog/mysql-bin
binlog_format           = ROW
binlog_row_image        = FULL
binlog_expire_logs_seconds = 604800
sync_binlog             = 0

# 慢查询
slow_query_log          = 1
slow_query_log_file     = /var/lib/mysql/slow.log
long_query_time         = 1

# 每个表独立表空间
innodb_file_per_table   = 1
注意

innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit = 2 和 sync_binlog = 0 是性能优先配置，崩溃可能丢失最多 1 秒数据。生产环境如需强一致改为 1，但吞吐量下降约 50%。

# 创建 binlog 目录
sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/mysql/binlog
sudo chown mysql:mysql /var/lib/mysql/binlog

# 重启 MySQL
sudo systemctl restart mysql

# 执行建表 SQL（从项目 docs/sql/ 目录获取）
mysql -u root -p trade_flow < docs/sql/trade-flow-base-schema.sql
mysql -u root -p trade_flow < docs/sql/trade-storage-shards.sql
mysql -u root -p trade_pipeline < docs/sql/trade-pipeline-base-schema.sql
mysql -u root -p trade_pipeline < docs/sql/trade-pipeline-year-shards.sql

3.2 安装 Redis 7.x

机器A 执行
# 添加 Redis 官方 PPA
sudo apt install -y software-properties-common
sudo add-apt-repository -y ppa:redislabs/redis
sudo apt update
sudo apt install -y redis

# 启动
sudo systemctl enable --now redis-server

Redis 配置

/etc/redis/redis.conf （关键项）
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
port 6379

# 内存限制 (16G 机器分配 2G)
maxmemory 2gb
maxmemory-policy noeviction

# 持久化 — Stream 数据允许丢失，优先性能
appendonly no
save ""

# 超时
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 60

# 密码
requirepass YourRedisPwd_2026

# 慢日志
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128
sudo systemctl restart redis-server

3.3 部署 Nginx（反向代理）

机器A 执行
sudo apt install -y nginx
/etc/nginx/sites-available/trade-ingress
upstream trade_ingress {
    server 127.0.0.1:8115;
    keepalive 32;
}

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name _;

    # 富友回调入口
    location /trade-ingress/ {
        proxy_pass http://trade_ingress;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;

        proxy_connect_timeout 5s;
        proxy_read_timeout 120s;
        proxy_send_timeout 10s;

        proxy_buffering off;
    }

    # 健康检查
    location /nginx-health {
        access_log off;
        return 200 "ok\n";
    }
}
sudo ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/trade-ingress /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/
sudo rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx

3.4 部署 trade-ingress

# 创建部署目录
sudo mkdir -p /opt/trade/ingress
sudo chown $USER:$USER /opt/trade/ingress

# 复制 JAR 包（从构建机拷贝）
cp trade-ingress-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.jar /opt/trade/ingress/

# 创建外部配置文件
cd /opt/trade/ingress
/opt/trade/ingress/application-prod.yml
spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:mysql://127.0.0.1:3306/trade_flow?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&serverTimezone=GMT%2B8&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true&connectTimeout=10000&socketTimeout=600000&tcpKeepAlive=true
    username: app_trade
    password: YourStrongPwd_2026
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
    hikari:
      connection-timeout: 30000
      validation-timeout: 5000
      idle-timeout: 600000
      max-lifetime: 1500000
      keepalive-time: 300000
      maximum-pool-size: 20
      minimum-idle: 5
      connection-test-query: SELECT 1
  data:
    redis:
      host: 127.0.0.1
      port: 6379
      database: 0
      password: YourRedisPwd_2026
      timeout: 3s
      lettuce:
        pool:
          max-active: 32
          max-idle: 16
          min-idle: 2
          max-wait: 3s

trade:
  thirdparty:
    fuiou:
      secret: rFXFhj8Z6GA96NQDqgg3N4djE0Dp54nj
  storage:
    local:
      sql-show: false
    datasource:
      url: ${spring.datasource.url}
      username: ${spring.datasource.username}
      password: ${spring.datasource.password}
      driver-class-name: ${spring.datasource.driver-class-name}
      hikari:
        maximum-pool-size: 10
        minimum-idle: 2
        connection-timeout: 30000
        validation-timeout: 5000

# 雪花 ID — 机器A 的 Ingress
global-id:
  snowflake:
    datacenter-id: 1
    worker-id: 1
  domains:
    storage:
      independent: true
      datacenter-id: 2
      worker-id: 1
/etc/systemd/system/trade-ingress.service
[Unit]
Description=Trade Ingress Service
After=network.target mysql.service redis-server.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=www-data
WorkingDirectory=/opt/trade/ingress
ExecStart=/usr/bin/java -Xms512m -Xmx2g -XX:+UseG1GC \
  -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 \
  -Duser.timezone=Asia/Shanghai \
  -Dspring.profiles.active=prod \
  -jar /opt/trade/ingress/trade-ingress-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.jar
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10
StandardOutput=append:/var/log/trade/ingress.log
StandardError=append:/var/log/trade/ingress-error.log

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
# 创建日志目录
sudo mkdir -p /var/log/trade
sudo chown www-data:www-data /var/log/trade

# 注册并启动
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now trade-ingress

3.5 部署 trade-pipeline

sudo mkdir -p /opt/trade/pipeline
sudo chown $USER:$USER /opt/trade/pipeline
cp trade-pipeline-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.jar /opt/trade/pipeline/
cd /opt/trade/pipeline
/opt/trade/pipeline/application-prod.yml
server:
  port: 8083
  servlet:
    context-path: /trade-pipeline

spring:
  datasource:
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
    url: jdbc:mysql://127.0.0.1:3306/trade_pipeline?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&useSSL=false&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
    username: app_trade
    password: YourStrongPwd_2026
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 30
      minimum-idle: 5
      connection-timeout: 30000
  data:
    redis:
      host: 127.0.0.1
      port: 6379
      password: YourRedisPwd_2026
      database: 0
      timeout: 3s
      lettuce:
        pool:
          max-active: 24
          max-idle: 16
          min-idle: 4

trade:
  pipeline:
    sharding:
      years:
        - 2026
        - 2027
      order-item-shard-count: 16
      sql-show: false
    order-event-consumer:
      enabled: true
      stream-key: stream:order-event
      group: trade-pipeline-order
      consumer-name: pipeline-order-a1
      batch-size: 100
      worker-count: 8
      worker-queue-capacity: 250
      block-timeout: 2s
      listener-watchdog-delay: 5000
      reclaim-delay: 30000
      pending-min-idle: 5m
      ingress-ack-url: http://127.0.0.1:8115/trade-ingress/event/ack
      ingress-batch-ack-url: http://127.0.0.1:8115/trade-ingress/event/batch-ack
      ingress-ack-connect-timeout: 3s
      ingress-ack-read-timeout: 5s
      ingress-unacked-url: http://127.0.0.1:8115/trade-ingress/event/unacked
    payment-event-consumer:
      enabled: true
      stream-key: stream:payment-event
      group: trade-pipeline-payment
      consumer-name: pipeline-payment-a1
      batch-size: 100
      worker-count: 4
      worker-queue-capacity: 250
      block-timeout: 2s
      listener-watchdog-delay: 5000
      reclaim-delay: 30000
      pending-min-idle: 5m
    unacked-event-pull:
      enabled: true
      initial-delay-ms: 60000
      fixed-delay-ms: 60000
      batch-size: 500
      max-batches-per-run: 100
      parallelism: 4
      terminal-failure-attempts: 3
      max-run-duration: 10m
      lease-duration: 15m
    performance-monitoring:
      enabled: true
      sample-interval-ms: 5000
      history-size: 60
      order-target-rps: 100
      payment-target-rps: 100
      queue-warning-percent: 50
      cpu-warning-percent: 80
      data-source-warning-percent: 90
    fuiou-order:
      zone-id: Asia/Shanghai
    fuiou-payment:
      zone-id: Asia/Shanghai
      year-boundary-window: 3h
  storage:
    local:
      sql-show: false
    datasource:
      driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
      url: jdbc:mysql://127.0.0.1:3306/trade_flow?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&useSSL=false&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
      username: app_trade
      password: YourStrongPwd_2026
      hikari:
        maximum-pool-size: 16
        minimum-idle: 4
        connection-timeout: 30000
        read-only: true

# 雪花 ID — 机器A 的 Pipeline
global-id:
  snowflake:
    datacenter-id: 1
    worker-id: 2
/etc/systemd/system/trade-pipeline.service
[Unit]
Description=Trade Pipeline Service
After=network.target mysql.service redis-server.service trade-ingress.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=www-data
WorkingDirectory=/opt/trade/pipeline
ExecStart=/usr/bin/java -Xms512m -Xmx3g -XX:+UseG1GC \
  -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 \
  -Duser.timezone=Asia/Shanghai \
  -Dspring.profiles.active=prod \
  -jar /opt/trade/pipeline/trade-pipeline-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.jar
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10
StandardOutput=append:/var/log/trade/pipeline.log
StandardError=append:/var/log/trade/pipeline-error.log

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now trade-pipeline

3.6 部署 Exporters

机器A 执行
# === node_exporter ===
cd /tmp
wget https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/releases/download/v1.8.2/node_exporter-1.8.2.linux-amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf node_exporter-1.8.2.linux-amd64.tar.gz
sudo cp node_exporter-1.8.2.linux-amd64/node_exporter /usr/local/bin/

sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/node-exporter.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Node Exporter
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/node_exporter --web.listen-address=:9100
Restart=on-failure

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

# === mysqld_exporter ===
wget https://github.com/prometheus/mysqld_exporter/releases/download/v0.15.1/mysqld_exporter-0.15.1.linux-amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf mysqld_exporter-0.15.1.linux-amd64.tar.gz
sudo cp mysqld_exporter-0.15.1.linux-amd64/mysqld_exporter /usr/local/bin/

sudo mkdir -p /etc/mysqld_exporter
sudo tee /etc/mysqld_exporter/.my.cnf << 'EOF'
[client]
user=monitor
password=Monitor_2026!
host=127.0.0.1
port=3306
EOF
sudo chmod 600 /etc/mysqld_exporter/.my.cnf

sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/mysqld-exporter.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=MySQL Exporter
After=network.target mysql.service

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/mysqld_exporter \
  --config.my-cnf=/etc/mysqld_exporter/.my.cnf \
  --web.listen-address=:9104
Restart=on-failure

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

# === redis_exporter ===
wget https://github.com/oliver006/redis_exporter/releases/download/v1.66.0/redis_exporter-v1.66.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf redis_exporter-v1.66.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz
sudo cp redis_exporter-v1.66.0.linux-amd64/redis_exporter /usr/local/bin/

sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/redis-exporter.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Redis Exporter
After=network.target redis-server.service

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/redis_exporter \
  --redis.addr=127.0.0.1:6379 \
  --redis.password=YourRedisPwd_2026 \
  --web.listen-address=:9121
Restart=on-failure

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

# 启动所有 exporter
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now node-exporter mysqld-exporter redis-exporter

# 验证
curl -s http://localhost:9100/metrics | head -5
curl -s http://localhost:9104/metrics | head -5
curl -s http://localhost:9121/metrics | head -5

4机器B 部署（32G — 数据分析）

机器B 32G RAM · Ubuntu 22.04 · IP: 10.0.1.20

职责：Flink CDC 实时同步机器A 的 MySQL binlog 到 Doris；trade-analytics 提供 OLAP 查询 API。

组件：Flink 1.18, Doris 2.1 (FE+BE), trade-analytics (8088), node_exporter

内存分配

OS
Flink 4G
Doris BE 16G
Doris FE 4G
Analytics 2G
exporter

4.1 安装 Apache Doris

机器B 执行
# 下载 Doris 2.1
cd /tmp
wget https://apache-doris-releases.oss-accelerate.aliyuncs.com/apache-doris-2.1.7-bin-x64.tar.gz

# 解压到 /opt
sudo mkdir -p /opt/doris
sudo tar xzf apache-doris-2.1.7-bin-x64.tar.gz -C /opt/doris --strip-components=1
sudo chown -R $USER:$USER /opt/doris

# 关闭 swap（Doris 要求）
sudo swapoff -a
sudo sed -i '/swap/d' /etc/fstab

Doris FE 配置

/opt/doris/fe/conf/fe.conf （关键项）
# 网络
priority_networks = 10.0.1.0/24

# 端口
http_port = 8030
rpc_port = 9020
query_port = 9030
edit_log_port = 9010

# 内存 (32G 机器分配 4G)
JAVA_OPTS="-Xmx4g -XX:+UseG1GC -Xlog:gc:gc.log:time,uptime:file=../log/gc.log"

# 存储
meta_dir = /opt/doris/fe/doris-meta

Doris BE 配置

/opt/doris/be/conf/be.conf （关键项）
# 网络
priority_networks = 10.0.1.0/24

# 端口
be_port = 9060
webserver_port = 8040
heartbeat_service_port = 9050
brpc_port = 8060

# 存储
storage_root_path = /opt/doris/be/storage

# 内存限制 (32G 机器分配 16G)
mem_limit = 16G

# 线程
tablet_writer_threads = 16

Systemd 服务

/etc/systemd/system/doris-fe.service
[Unit]
Description=Doris Frontend
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=forking
WorkingDirectory=/opt/doris/fe
ExecStart=/opt/doris/fe/bin/start_fe.sh --daemon
ExecStop=/opt/doris/fe/bin/stop_fe.sh
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10
LimitNOFILE=655350

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
/etc/systemd/system/doris-be.service
[Unit]
Description=Doris Backend
After=network.target doris-fe.service

[Service]
Type=forking
WorkingDirectory=/opt/doris/be
ExecStart=/opt/doris/be/bin/start_be.sh --daemon
ExecStop=/opt/doris/be/bin/stop_be.sh
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10
LimitNOFILE=655350

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
# 启动 Doris
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now doris-fe
sleep 5
sudo systemctl enable --now doris-be

# 添加 BE 节点
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 9030 -u root -e "ALTER SYSTEM ADD BACKEND '10.0.1.20:9050';"

# 验证
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 9030 -u root -e "SHOW BACKENDS\G"
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 9030 -u root -e "SHOW FRONTENDS\G"

4.2 安装 Flink 1.18 + CDC

机器B 执行
# 下载 Flink 1.18
cd /tmp
wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/flink/flink-1.18.1/flink-1.18.1-bin-scala_2.12.tgz
sudo tar xzf flink-1.18.1-bin-scala_2.12.tgz -C /opt/
sudo mv /opt/flink-1.18.1 /opt/flink
sudo chown -R $USER:$USER /opt/flink

# 下载 CDC + Doris Connector JAR
cd /opt/flink/lib
wget https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/apache/flink/flink-sql-connector-mysql-cdc/3.0.1/flink-sql-connector-mysql-cdc-3.0.1.jar
wget https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/apache/doris/flink-doris-connector-1.18/24.0.0/flink-doris-connector-1.18-24.0.0.jar
/opt/flink/conf/flink-conf.yaml （关键项）
jobmanager.rpc.address: 127.0.0.1
jobmanager.rpc.port: 6123
jobmanager.memory.process.size: 2g
taskmanager.memory.process.size: 2g
taskmanager.numberOfTaskSlots: 4
rest.port: 8081
/etc/systemd/system/flink.service
[Unit]
Description=Flink Cluster
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=forking
WorkingDirectory=/opt/flink
ExecStart=/opt/flink/bin/start-cluster.sh
ExecStop=/opt/flink/bin/stop-cluster.sh
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10
User=root

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now flink

# 验证
curl -s http://localhost:8081/overview

提交 CDC 同步作业

修改 TradeCdcJob.java 中的源库连接信息，指向机器A 的 MySQL CDC 账号，目标库指向本地 Doris。

CDC 源表配置（关键修改项）
// MySQL CDC 源 — 指向机器A
'hostname' = '10.0.1.10',
'port' = '3306',
'username' = 'cdc_user',
'password' = 'CdcSync_2026!',
'database-name' = 'trade_pipeline',
'table-name' = 'oms_order_2026',
'server-time-zone' = 'Asia/Shanghai',
'scan.startup.mode' = 'initial'

// Doris 目标 — 指向本地
'fenodes' = '127.0.0.1:8030',
'username' = 'root',
'password' = '',
'table.identifier' = 'trade_pipeline.oms_order_2026'
# 打包并提交
cd /path/to/trade-cdc
mvn clean package -DskipTests

# 提交到 Flink
/opt/flink/bin/flink run \
  -c com.mtx.trade.cdc.TradeCdcJob \
  -p 2 \
  target/trade-cdc-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.jar

4.3 部署 trade-analytics

sudo mkdir -p /opt/trade/analytics
sudo chown $USER:$USER /opt/trade/analytics
cp trade-analytics-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.jar /opt/trade/analytics/
cd /opt/trade/analytics
/opt/trade/analytics/application-prod.yml
server:
  port: 8088
  servlet:
    context-path: /trade-analytics

spring:
  profiles:
    active: prod
  datasource:
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
    # 指向 Doris FE 的 MySQL 协议端口
    url: jdbc:mysql://127.0.0.1:9030/trade_pipeline?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8&useSSL=false
    username: root
    password:
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 10
      minimum-idle: 2
      connection-timeout: 30000

mybatis-plus:
  mapper-locations: classpath*:/mapper/**/*.xml
  configuration:
    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true
    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.nologging.NoLoggingImpl

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: always
/etc/systemd/system/trade-analytics.service
[Unit]
Description=Trade Analytics Service
After=network.target doris-fe.service

[Service]
Type=simple
User=www-data
WorkingDirectory=/opt/trade/analytics
ExecStart=/usr/bin/java -Xms512m -Xmx2g -XX:+UseG1GC \
  -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 \
  -Duser.timezone=Asia/Shanghai \
  -jar /opt/trade/analytics/trade-analytics-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.jar
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=10
StandardOutput=append:/var/log/trade/analytics.log
StandardError=append:/var/log/trade/analytics-error.log

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now trade-analytics

4.4 部署 node_exporter

# 同机器A 的 node_exporter 安装步骤
cd /tmp
wget https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/releases/download/v1.8.2/node_exporter-1.8.2.linux-amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf node_exporter-1.8.2.linux-amd64.tar.gz
sudo cp node_exporter-1.8.2.linux-amd64/node_exporter /usr/local/bin/

sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/node-exporter.service << 'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Node Exporter
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/node_exporter --web.listen-address=:9100
Restart=on-failure

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF

sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now node-exporter

5机器C 部署（8C 8G — 监控中心）

机器C 8C 8G RAM · Ubuntu 22.04 · IP: 10.0.1.30

职责：Prometheus 指标采集与存储，Grafana 可视化看板；同时承载一套独立的 MySQL + Redis + Java 服务（可做开发/测试/灾备）。

组件：Prometheus, Grafana, MySQL 8.x, Redis 7.x, trade-ingress + trade-pipeline, node_exporter

内存分配

OS 1G
Prom 1G
Grafana 0.5G
MySQL 2G
Redis 1G
Java 2G
exporter

5.1 安装 Prometheus

机器C 执行
# 创建专用用户
sudo useradd --no-create-home --shell /bin/false prometheus

# 创建目录
sudo mkdir -p /etc/prometheus /var/lib/prometheus
sudo chown prometheus:prometheus /etc/prometheus /var/lib/prometheus

# 下载
cd /tmp
wget https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/download/v2.54.0/prometheus-2.54.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz
tar xzf prometheus-2.54.0.linux-amd64.tar.gz

# 安装
sudo cp prometheus-2.54.0.linux-amd64/prometheus /usr/local/bin/
sudo cp prometheus-2.54.0.linux-amd64/promtool /usr/local/bin/
sudo cp -r prometheus-2.54.0.linux-amd64/consoles /etc/prometheus/
sudo cp -r prometheus-2.54.0.linux-amd64/console_libraries /etc/prometheus/
sudo chown -R prometheus:prometheus /usr/local/bin/prometheus /usr/local/bin/promtool /etc/prometheus
/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
global:
  scrape_interval: 15s
  evaluation_interval: 15s
  external_labels:
    cluster: 'trade-flow'

# 告警规则
rule_files:
  - "rules/*.yml"

# 告警推送
# alerting:
#   alertmanagers:
#     - static_configs:
#         - targets: ['localhost:9093']

scrape_configs:
  # === 机器A ===
  - job_name: 'node-a'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['10.0.1.10:9100']
        labels:
          machine: 'A'
          role: 'business'

  - job_name: 'mysql-a'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['10.0.1.10:9104']
        labels:
          machine: 'A'

  - job_name: 'redis-a'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['10.0.1.10:9121']
        labels:
          machine: 'A'

  - job_name: 'ingress-a'
    metrics_path: '/trade-ingress/actuator/prometheus'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['10.0.1.10:8115']
        labels:
          machine: 'A'

  - job_name: 'pipeline-a'
    metrics_path: '/trade-pipeline/actuator/prometheus'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['10.0.1.10:8083']
        labels:
          machine: 'A'

  # === 机器B ===
  - job_name: 'node-b'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['10.0.1.20:9100']
        labels:
          machine: 'B'
          role: 'analytics'

  - job_name: 'doris-fe-b'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['10.0.1.20:8030']
        labels:
          machine: 'B'

  - job_name: 'flink-b'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['10.0.1.20:8081']
        labels:
          machine: 'B'

  # === 机器C (本机) ===
  - job_name: 'node-c'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['127.0.0.1:9100']
        labels:
          machine: 'C'
          role: 'monitor'

  - job_name: 'mysql-c'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['127.0.0.1:9104']
        labels:
          machine: 'C'

  - job_name: 'redis-c'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['127.0.0.1:9121']
        labels:
          machine: 'C'

  - job_name: 'prometheus'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['127.0.0.1:9090']
/etc/systemd/system/prometheus.service
[Unit]
Description=Prometheus
After=network.target

[Service]
User=prometheus
Group=prometheus
Type=simple
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/prometheus \
  --config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml \
  --storage.tsdb.path=/var/lib/prometheus \
  --storage.tsdb.retention.time=30d \
  --web.console.templates=/etc/prometheus/consoles \
  --web.console.libraries=/etc/prometheus/console_libraries \
  --web.listen-address=0.0.0.0:9090
Restart=on-failure

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
sudo chown prometheus:prometheus /etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now prometheus

# 验证
curl -s http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets | python3 -m json.tool | head -20

5.2 安装 Grafana

机器C 执行
# 添加 Grafana APT 源
sudo apt install -y adduser libfontconfig1 musl
wget https://dl.grafana.com/oss/release/grafana_11.2.0_amd64.deb
sudo dpkg -i grafana_11.2.0_amd64.deb

# 启动
sudo systemctl enable --now grafana-server

# 验证
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health

配置数据源

访问 http://10.0.1.30:3000（默认账号 admin / admin），添加 Prometheus 数据源：

配置项值
NamePrometheus
URLhttp://127.0.0.1:9090
AccessServer
Scrape interval15s

推荐 Dashboard

在 Grafana 中 Import 以下官方 Dashboard（通过 ID 导入）：

DashboardID用途
Node Exporter Full1860主机 CPU / 内存 / 磁盘 / 网络
MySQL Overview7362MySQL QPS / 连接数 / Buffer Pool
Redis Dashboard11835Redis 内存 / 命中率 / Stream
JVM (Micrometer)4701Java 堆 / GC / 线程
Doris Overview—Doris BE/FE 监控（Doris 内置）
Flink Dashboard14924Flink 作业 / Checkpoint

5.3 安装本机 MySQL + Redis

机器C 承载一套独立业务环境，安装步骤与机器A 相同但规格更小：

/etc/mysql/mysql.conf.d/trade-c.cnf （关键差异）
[mysqld]
innodb_buffer_pool_size = 2G
innodb_buffer_pool_instances = 2
max_connections = 100
server_id = 30
log_bin = /var/lib/mysql/binlog/mysql-bin
binlog_format = ROW
Redis (机器C) — 关键差异
maxmemory 1gb
requirepass YourRedisPwd_C_2026

本机的 trade-ingress 和 trade-pipeline 配置与机器A 相同，但需修改雪花 ID 以避免冲突：

机器C Ingress — 雪花 ID
global-id:
  snowflake:
    datacenter-id: 3       # 与机器A 不同
    worker-id: 1
  domains:
    storage:
      independent: true
      datacenter-id: 4     # 与机器A 不同
      worker-id: 1
机器C Pipeline — 雪花 ID
global-id:
  snowflake:
    datacenter-id: 3
    worker-id: 2
关键约束

三机部署相同服务时，雪花 ID 的 (datacenterId, workerId) 必须全局唯一，否则会产生重复 ID。上面的配置已保证三机不冲突。

5.4 安装 Exporters

机器C 需安装 node_exporter、mysqld_exporter、redis_exporter，步骤与机器A 完全相同。mysqld_exporter 和 redis_exporter 的连接信息改为本机 MySQL/Redis。

6监控配置

6.1 告警规则

/etc/prometheus/rules/trade-alerts.yml
groups:
  - name: trade-infrastructure
    rules:
      # === 主机 ===
      - alert: NodeDown
        expr: up{job=~"node-.*"} == 0
        for: 1m
        labels:
          severity: critical
        annotations:
          summary: "主机 {{ $labels.machine }} 不可达"

      - alert: HighCpuUsage
        expr: 100 - (avg by(instance)(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle"}[5m])) * 100) > 80
        for: 5m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "CPU 使用率 > 80% ({{ $labels.instance }})"

      - alert: HighMemoryUsage
        expr: (1 - node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes / node_memory_MemTotal_bytes) * 100 > 85
        for: 5m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "内存使用率 > 85% ({{ $labels.instance }})"

      - alert: DiskSpaceLow
        expr: (1 - node_filesystem_avail_bytes / node_filesystem_size_bytes) * 100 > 85
        for: 5m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "磁盘使用率 > 85% ({{ $labels.instance }})"

      # === MySQL ===
      - alert: MysqlDown
        expr: mysql_up == 0
        for: 1m
        labels:
          severity: critical
        annotations:
          summary: "MySQL 不可达 ({{ $labels.instance }})"

      - alert: MysqlHighConnections
        expr: mysql_global_status_threads_connected / mysql_global_variables_max_connections * 100 > 80
        for: 5m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "MySQL 连接数 > 80% ({{ $labels.instance }})"

      - alert: MysqlSlowQueries
        expr: rate(mysql_global_status_slow_queries[5m]) > 5
        for: 5m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "MySQL 慢查询频繁 ({{ $labels.instance }})"

      # === Redis ===
      - alert: RedisDown
        expr: redis_up == 0
        for: 1m
        labels:
          severity: critical
        annotations:
          summary: "Redis 不可达 ({{ $labels.instance }})"

      - alert: RedisHighMemory
        expr: redis_memory_used_bytes / redis_memory_max_bytes * 100 > 85
        for: 5m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "Redis 内存使用 > 85% ({{ $labels.instance }})"

      - alert: RedisEvictedKeys
        expr: increase(redis_evicted_keys_total[5m]) > 0
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "Redis 发生 Key 淘汰 ({{ $labels.instance }})"

  - name: trade-business
    rules:
      # === Ingress ===
      - alert: IngressDown
        expr: up{job="ingress-a"} == 0
        for: 1m
        labels:
          severity: critical
        annotations:
          summary: "trade-ingress 不可达"

      - alert: IngressHighLatency
        expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket[5m])) > 2
        for: 5m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "Ingress P95 延迟 > 2s"

      # === Pipeline ===
      - alert: PipelineDown
        expr: up{job="pipeline-a"} == 0
        for: 1m
        labels:
          severity: critical
        annotations:
          summary: "trade-pipeline 不可达"

      - alert: StreamBacklog
        expr: redis_stream_length{key="stream:order-event"} > 100000
        for: 5m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: "订单 Stream 积压 > 10万"

      # === Doris ===
      - alert: DorisBeDown
        expr: up{job="doris-fe-b"} == 0
        for: 1m
        labels:
          severity: critical
        annotations:
          summary: "Doris FE 不可达"
# 创建规则目录并加载
sudo mkdir -p /etc/prometheus/rules
sudo chown prometheus:prometheus /etc/prometheus/rules
sudo systemctl reload prometheus

6.2 全链路监控覆盖矩阵

监控层 指标来源 关键指标 机器
主机 node_exporter :9100 CPU, 内存, 磁盘, 网络, 文件句柄 A, B, C
MySQL mysqld_exporter :9104 QPS, 连接数, Buffer Pool 命中率, 慢查询, 行锁等待 A, C
Redis redis_exporter :9121 内存使用, 连接数, Stream 长度, Key 淘汰, 命中率 A, C
Ingress Spring Actuator :8115 请求 QPS, P95/P99 延迟, JVM 堆/GC, HikariCP 活跃连接 A, C
Pipeline Spring Actuator :8083 消费 TPS, Worker 队列深度, 处理延迟, ACK 失败计数 A, C
Flink Flink REST :8081 作业状态, Checkpoint, 背压, Source/Source 延迟 B
Doris Doris FE :8030 查询 QPS, 导入 RPS, Tablet 健康, BE 内存 B
Pipeline 内置性能端点

除 Prometheus 指标外，Pipeline 还提供 GET /trade-pipeline/performance/current 端点，返回最近 5 分钟的紧凑时间序列、瓶颈结论和调参建议，可直接交给 AI 分析。

7网络与安全

7.1 端口矩阵

机器 端口 服务 内网开放 外网开放
A80 / 443Nginx—是（富友回调）
A3306MySQLB (CDC), C (监控)否
A6379Redis仅本机否
A8115trade-ingressC (Prometheus)否
A8083trade-pipelineC (Prometheus)否
A9100/9104/9121Exporters仅 C否
B8030Doris FE HTTPC (Prometheus)否
B9030Doris FE MySQL仅本机否
B8081Flink WebC (Prometheus)否
B8088trade-analytics内网否
B9100node_exporter仅 C否
C9090Prometheus内网否
C3000Grafana运维网络可选（需 VPN）

7.2 防火墙配置

机器A — UFW 规则

机器A 执行
sudo ufw default deny incoming
sudo ufw default allow outgoing

# 对外：富友回调
sudo ufw allow 80/tcp
sudo ufw allow 443/tcp

# 对机器B：MySQL binlog CDC
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.20 to any port 3306

# 对机器C：监控拉取
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.30 to any port 9100
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.30 to any port 9104
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.30 to any port 9121
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.30 to any port 8115
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.30 to any port 8083

sudo ufw enable

机器B — UFW 规则

机器B 执行
sudo ufw default deny incoming
sudo ufw default allow outgoing

# 对机器C：监控拉取
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.30 to any port 9100
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.30 to any port 8030
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.30 to any port 8081

# 对内网：analytics API
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.0/24 to any port 8088

sudo ufw enable

机器C — UFW 规则

机器C 执行
sudo ufw default deny incoming
sudo ufw default allow outgoing

# Prometheus（内网访问）
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.0/24 to any port 9090

# Grafana（运维网络）
sudo ufw allow from 10.0.1.0/24 to any port 3000

sudo ufw enable
安全建议

Grafana 如需外网访问，强烈建议通过 VPN 或 SSH 隧道，不要直接暴露 3000 端口到公网。如必须暴露，至少启用 Nginx 反向代理 + Basic Auth + IP 白名单。

8验证与运维

8.1 启动顺序

首次部署或全量重启时，按以下顺序依次启动：

顺序机器服务命令
1AMySQLsudo systemctl start mysql
2ARedissudo systemctl start redis-server
3ANginxsudo systemctl start nginx
4Atrade-ingresssudo systemctl start trade-ingress
5Atrade-pipelinesudo systemctl start trade-pipeline
6AExporterssudo systemctl start node-exporter mysqld-exporter redis-exporter
7BDoris FE → BEsudo systemctl start doris-fe && sleep 5 && sudo systemctl start doris-be
8BFlinksudo systemctl start flink
9Btrade-analyticssudo systemctl start trade-analytics
10Bnode_exportersudo systemctl start node-exporter
11CMySQL → Redissudo systemctl start mysql redis-server
12CPrometheussudo systemctl start prometheus
13CGrafanasudo systemctl start grafana-server
14CJava 服务 + Exporterssudo systemctl start trade-ingress trade-pipeline node-exporter mysqld-exporter redis-exporter

8.2 健康检查

机器A 验证
# Ingress 健康
curl -s http://localhost:8115/trade-ingress/actuator/health | python3 -m json.tool

# Pipeline 健康
curl -s http://localhost:8083/trade-pipeline/actuator/health | python3 -m json.tool

# Pipeline 性能报告
curl -s http://localhost:8083/trade-pipeline/performance/current | python3 -m json.tool

# Nginx 健康
curl -s http://localhost/nginx-health

# MySQL 连接
mysql -u app_trade -p -e "SELECT NOW();"

# Redis 连接
redis-cli -a YourRedisPwd_2026 PING

# Exporters
curl -s http://localhost:9100/metrics | grep node_load1
curl -s http://localhost:9104/metrics | grep mysql_up
curl -s http://localhost:9121/metrics | grep redis_up
机器B 验证
# Doris FE
curl -s http://localhost:8030/api/health

# Doris BE 状态
mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 9030 -u root -e "SHOW BACKENDS\G"

# Flink
curl -s http://localhost:8081/overview

# Analytics
curl -s http://localhost:8088/trade-analytics/actuator/health

# node_exporter
curl -s http://localhost:9100/metrics | grep node_load1
机器C 验证
# Prometheus
curl -s http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets | python3 -m json.tool | grep health

# 所有 target 状态
curl -s http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets | \
  python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f\"{t['labels'].get('job','?'):20s} {t['health']:10s} {t['scrapeUrl']}\") for t in d['data']['activeTargets']]"

# Grafana
curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health

8.3 常用运维命令

操作命令
查看服务日志sudo journalctl -u trade-ingress -f --since "10 min ago"
查看应用日志tail -f /var/log/trade/ingress.log
重启 Ingresssudo systemctl restart trade-ingress
重启 Pipelinesudo systemctl restart trade-pipeline
Prometheus 重载配置curl -X POST http://localhost:9090/-/reload
查看 Prometheus targetscurl -s http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets | python3 -m json.tool
查看 Redis Streamredis-cli -a YourRedisPwd_2026 XLEN stream:order-event
查看消费者组redis-cli -a YourRedisPwd_2026 XINFO GROUPS stream:order-event
MySQL 慢查询sudo tail -f /var/lib/mysql/slow.log
Doris 查询mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 9030 -u root
Flink 作业列表curl -s http://localhost:8081/jobs

8.4 压测前检查清单

压测前逐项确认

1. 三机时间同步：chronyc tracking 确认 Offset < 500ms

2. MySQL binlog 开启：SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'log_bin'; 返回 ON

3. Redis Stream 高水位配置：TRADE_STREAM_MAX_LENGTH 已按预期峰值设置

4. Pipeline pending-min-idle：已调整为 5m，避免压测期间 PEL 误回收

5. Prometheus targets 全部 UP：curl http://10.0.1.30:9090/api/v1/targets 无 down

6. Grafana 数据源正常：Dashboard 可正常展示实时数据

7. 防火墙规则：机器C 可访问 A/B 的所有 exporter 端口

8. 磁盘空间：三机可用空间 > 50%

压测数据生成

使用项目 scripts/fake_data 目录下的脚本生成压测数据。脚本通过 HTTP 向 Ingress 发送模拟富友回调，可指定日期范围、总订单量和并发数。示例：python3 main.py --total-orders 1000000 --start-date 2025-01-01 --end-date 2025-01-07 --concurrency 50

Trade Flow 三机器部署文档 · 版本 1.0 · 2026-07-24

本文档基于项目当前代码和配置编写，实际部署时请根据硬件规格和网络环境调整参数。
